Name: m11_EnvLightTexBank
Description: Determines the parameters for environmental lighting textures.

Fields.Name: Enable
Fields.Description: If ON, this row is enabled.

Fields.Name: Automatic Update
Fields.Description: If ON, this row automatically updates.

Fields.Name: Base: RGB Reverse Magnification %
Fields.Description: All light colors are multiplied by the reciprocal of this value.

Fields.Name: Diffuse 0: Resource Name ID
Fields.Description: The texture filename to use for this texture.

Fields.Name: Diffuse 0: RGB Reverse Magnification %
Fields.Description: All light colors are multiplied by the reciprocal of this value.

Fields.Name: Diffuse 0: Specular Power
Fields.Description: The specular power used for this texture.

Fields.Name: Specular 0: Resource Name ID
Fields.Description: The texture filename to use for this texture.

Fields.Name: Specular 0: RGB Reverse Magnification %
Fields.Description: All light colors are multiplied by the reciprocal of this value.

Fields.Name: Specular 0: Specular Power
Fields.Description: The specular power used for this texture.

Fields.Name: Specular 1: Resource Name ID
Fields.Description: The texture filename to use for this texture.

Fields.Name: Specular 1: RGB Reverse Magnification %
Fields.Description: All light colors are multiplied by the reciprocal of this value.

Fields.Name: Specular 1: Specular Power
Fields.Description: The specular power used for this texture.

Fields.Name: Specular 2: Resource Name ID
Fields.Description: The texture filename to use for this texture.

Fields.Name: Specular 2: RGB Reverse Magnification %
Fields.Description: All light colors are multiplied by the reciprocal of this value.

Fields.Name: Specular 2: Specular Power
Fields.Description: The specular power used for this texture.

Fields.Name: Specular 3: Resource Name ID
Fields.Description: The texture filename to use for this texture.

Fields.Name: Specular 3: RGB Reverse Magnification %
Fields.Description: All light colors are multiplied by the reciprocal of this value.

Fields.Name: Specular 3: Specular Power
Fields.Description: The specular power used for this texture.

Fields.Name: Light Source 0: Horizontal Angle
Fields.Description: The horizontal angle to use for this light source. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Light Source 0: Vertical Angle
Fields.Description: The vertical angle to use for this light source. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Light Source 0: R
Fields.Description: The red component of the RGBA color used for this light source.

Fields.Name: Light Source 0: G
Fields.Description: The green component of the RGBA color used for this light source.

Fields.Name: Light Source 0: B
Fields.Description: The blue component of the RGBA color used for this light source.

Fields.Name: Light Source 0: Alpha
Fields.Description: The alpha component of the RGBA color used for this light source.
